title: SQL injection vulnerability in user lookup
desc: The user lookup query uses string formatting instead of parameterized queries, which could allow SQL injection attacks.

title: Potential SQL injection in user query
desc: User query string interpolation should use parameterized queries to prevent injection.

title: Missing password hashing
desc: The password is stored directly without hashing in the register function.

title: Rate limiter missing on registration
desc: The registration endpoint should have rate limiting to prevent abuse.

title: Hardcoded JWT secret key
desc: JWT secret is hardcoded; should use environment variables.

title: Inefficient N+1 query pattern
desc: The session loading performs N+1 queries; should use JOIN or batch loading.
